title: javai-R conformance case suite
description: Schema for statistical conformance reference datasets produced by javai-R. Each JSON file represents one suite of test cases.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this suite tests.

method.description: Statistical method used to produce expected values.

tolerance.description: Absolute tolerance for floating-point comparison of expected values. A tolerance of 0 means exact match is required.

cases.description: The individual test cases in this suite.

name.description: Unique, descriptive case identifier within this suite.

approach.description: Sub-approach within the suite (e.g. 'sample_size_first', 'threshold_first'). Present only in suites with multiple derivation strategies.

inputs.description: Input parameters for the statistical computation. Keys vary by suite.

expected.description: Expected outputs from R's reference computation. Keys vary by suite. Numeric values should be compared within the suite's tolerance. Boolean and string values should be compared exactly.
